channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Amazon divise par 3 le prix de sa petite caméra de surveillance qui filme en 360°
item.description: Compacte et discrète, la caméra Blink Mini Pan-Tilt est la solution parfaite pour surveiller son logement sans se ruiner. Vendue autour de 59 euros, elle tombe aujourd’hui à seulement 19 euros, une promo qui la rend particulièrement intéressante.

item.title: Trump has terminated several members of the independent National Science Board
item.description: As reported by several outlets, the Trump administration dismissed members of the National Science Board (NSB), which is tasked with establishing policies for the National Science Foundation. It's not clear how many members have been dismissed. According to screenshots shared with The Washington Post, board members received a message that their position was "terminated, effective immediately. The NSB establishes policies for the National Science Foundation (NSF), the independent US agency responsible for apportioning about 25 percent of federal support towards research conducted by the country...

item.title: Quels sont les meilleurs écouteurs filaires en 2026 ? Notre sélection
item.description: Malgré l'hégémonie des écouteurs Bluetooth, les écouteurs filaires n'ont pas dit leur dernier mot. Ils ont l'avantage de proposer un son de grande qualité et de ne pas avoir besoin d'être rechargés. Découvrez ci-dessous notre sélection des meilleurs écouteurs filaires.

item.title: Do you have a 'kitchen graveyard' of broken appliances? Here's how to care for your gadgets and keep them working longer
item.description: Over a third of people have a broken kitchen appliance gathering dust in a cabinet, say experts, but it doesn't have to be that way.

item.title: 15 sub-$50 accessories to give your coffee station an instant boost (and they'd all make excellent Mother's Day gifts)
item.description: Affordable coffee-making accessories to make your morning routine feel even more special.

item.title: Trump turns the WHCD shooting into a pitch for the White House ballroom
item.description: Within hours of an armed gunman's attempt to enter the White House Correspondents Dinner, attended by top administration officials and hundreds of journalists, President Donald Trump did what he does best: use the assassination attempt to defend his ballroom project. During a White House press conference just hours after he and several cabinet members were […]...

item.title: An OpenAI-linked news outlet appears to be entirely AI-generated
item.description: A new report reveals that a news publication is entirely AI-generated and is funded by an OpenAI super PAC

item.title: TechCrunch Mobility: Elon’s admission
item.description: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility — your central hub for news and insights on the future of transportation.

item.title: Tomora’s Come Closer is an ecstatic love letter to 90s dance music
item.description: Before Coachella, Tomora wasn't on my radar at all. It's actually only by chance that I stumbled upon them - I opened the wrong stream because my TV was lagging like a MFer. I paused for a few moments, entranced by the two ethereal Nordic women banging on giant drums to a techno beat. I […]

item.title: Nothing Phone (4a) Pro vs Google Pixel 10a : quel smartphone au bon rapport qualité/prix choisir ?
item.description: Cette année, Google a fait le choix du surplace avec un Pixel 10a trop sage. En face, Nothing fait lui le pari de la turbulence, avec un Phone (4a) Pro qui chamboule tout, et impressionne à bien des égards. Alors, comment bien choisir son futur smartphone milieu de gamme ?

item.title: I wanted an online store, so I turned to the CubeCart open-source solution
item.description: If you're ready to create an online store, consider using this open-source solution, CubeCart.
